q: __________ is the school festival? – It’s in October.
__________ do you have English class? – On Mondays.
__________ did you stay home yesterday? – Because it was raining.
__________ is your birthday? – It’s in July.
__________ do you usually study after school? – At the library.
__________ is the math test? – It’s next Friday.
__________ did she open the window? – Because the room was hot.
__________ do you keep your backpack? – In my room.
__________ do we celebrate Christmas? – In December.
__________ did he run so fast? – Because he was late.
__________ is your classroom? – On the third floor.
__________ did you start learning English? – In elementary school.
__________ do they eat lunch? – In the cafeteria.
__________ is the school trip? – It’s in May.
__________ did she choose that book? – Because it looked interesting.
__________ do you play soccer? – On Saturdays.
__________ is the meeting held? – In the teacher’s office.
__________ did the movie start? – At 7 p.m.
__________ do you like spring the most? – Because the weather is nice.
__________ is the science fair? – It’s in April.
